title: Multi-Head Self-Attention
subtitle: Q, K, V → scores → softmax → weighted blend

nodes.label: X · token vectors
nodes.desc: The layer input: one vector per token (n × d_model). Every token will be compared against every other.

nodes.label: Wq
nodes.desc: Learned query projection. Multiplying each token vector by Wq produces its Query.

nodes.label: Wk
nodes.desc: Learned key projection — produces each token’s Key.

nodes.label: Wv
nodes.desc: Learned value projection — produces each token’s Value.

nodes.label: Q
nodes.desc: Queries — what each token is looking for.

nodes.label: K
nodes.desc: Keys — what each token offers to be matched against.

nodes.label: V
nodes.desc: Values — the content each token will contribute.

nodes.label: QKᵀ
nodes.desc: Every Query dotted with every Key → an n×n score matrix: how strongly each token should attend to each other token.

nodes.label: Softmax ÷√dₖ
nodes.desc: Scores are scaled by 1/√dₖ for stability, then each row is softmaxed into attention weights that sum to 1.

nodes.label: A · V
nodes.desc: Attention weights multiply the Values: each token’s output becomes a weighted blend of all Values.

nodes.label: Concat · Wₒ
nodes.desc: The h heads ran in parallel on different sub-spaces; their outputs are concatenated and mixed back to d_model by Wₒ.

nodes.label: Output
nodes.desc: A context-enriched vector for every token, ready for the next sub-layer.
